titleStmt.title: SII 9.346: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 346. (A.R. No. 33 of 1904.) ON A PILLAR IN THE BASTI AT KOGALI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Yuva, Āśvayuja, śu. Paurṇamī, Guruvāra. Yuva in Rāmanāthadēva's reign to which the record belongs was A.D. 1275. In this year Āśvayuja śu. 15 fell on Sunday (not Thursday) 6th October. In the next year Dhātu = A.D. 1276, the tithi did fall on Thursday 24th September. This was probably the intended date. It registers the money-grants made by several Jaina devotees for the daily ablusion of Chenna-Pārśvadēva of Kōgaḷi which is called a tīrtha.

First Face.The following two lines are engraved above this inscription:—
śrīmatkollāpurasthānē śrīsāmaṁtajināḷayē śrīmatkanakanaṁ-
dīti khyātācāryyō bhavammaniḥ || tacciṣya śrīprabhāca

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ siddhēbhyaḥ . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāya
ṇa pratāpacakravartti śrīrāmanāthadēva sthirarājyaṁgeyyu
ttiha yivasaṁvatsarada Āśvaija śuddha paurṇnami guruvāradalu
kōgiḷiya tīrtthada ceṁnapārśvadēvarige śrīmannāḷva prabhu dēvi
seṭṭiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhiṣēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
sāvubāyiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
Ēcaladēviyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
tippaṇnaṁ Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
cavuḍādēvi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
kaḍabara nāgaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
rahutarāya tippaṇnaṁ Akṣayabhaṁ2ḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
Apparasana maga tippaṇnaṁ Akṣeyabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
mādigauḍana sōvaṇnaṁ Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
cikkanaṁbayanu Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
haḍavaḷa būṁmaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
māi seṭṭiya mādave Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
hāḍuvitiya baica Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1

śrīrāyarājagurupāryyasahaṇi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāna 1
koḷḷipākiya sōyiseṭṭiya maga bo(ṁ)mmiseṭṭi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
koṭṭūra chaladaṁka baiciseṭṭiyaru nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa paṇa 5
hāniyada sāsaviseṭṭiyaru nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāna 1
koṭṭūra vaḍḍabevahāri kammadēva nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāna 1
koṭṭūra vaḍḍabevahāri vāsudēva nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāna 1
hoḷaguṁdeya sāvatta mallagauḍana maga kallagauḍa nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāna 1
hoḷaguṁdeya māriseṭiya cikkarāmayya nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ma 5
jeṁtole sirivura jainakāḷayya nityābhisēkhake koṭṭa gadyāna 1
kaḍaṁba nāgayyana magaḷu banadauve nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ma 5
dēvarasara Aḷiya rāmarasaru nityābhisēkake koṭṭa gadyāna 1
koṭūra beṭṭiseṭiya rāmayya nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ma 5
koṭūra kētiseṭṭiya maga cavaḍaya nityābisēkake koṭṭa gadyāna 1
koṭūra heggaḍe māidēvana maga vāmaya nityābhisēkake koṭṭa gadyāna 1
siṁdavigeya bhadrasēnapaṁḍita nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ma 5
ṇamadēviyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ga
tippaṇana kumāri cokaladēvi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkake koṭṭa ga 1
yitamadavaḷige sāvubāyiru saravaḷigeya
Digital edition of SII 9.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
